use_cases: Confirmation dialogs for destructive actions like deletions or data loss
Form overlays for user input requiring focused attention
Settings or preferences panels displayed as modals
Alert or warning messages that require user acknowledgment
Content previews or details displayed in an overlay
ai_summary: A modal dialog component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Features multiple button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and full dark mode support. Includes a close button with X icon and supports accessibility-focused patterns with proper focus management and aria attributes.
